remarks: Welcome to 64 George Street, Stamford! This well-maintained rental offers comfortable living in one of Stamford's most convenient locations. Situated in the desirable Cove neighborhood, this home provides easy access to downtown Stamford, Cove Island Park, beaches, Metro-North, I-95, shopping, restaurants, and entertainment, making it an ideal choice for commuters and anyone looking to enjoy everything the city has to offer.  The residence features a bright and functional layout with generously sized living spaces, abundant natural light, and a welcoming atmosphere perfect for everyday living. The spacious kitchen offers ample cabinetry and workspace, while the comfortable 2 bedrooms provide plenty of room to relax. Located in an established residential neighborhood, this rental combines charm, convenience, and accessibility. Just minutes from parks, schools, public transportation, shopping centers, and major highways, you'll have everything you need within easy reach.  Don't miss this opportunity to lease a well-located unit in one of Stamford's most sought-after neighborhoods. Schedule your private showing today!
